items.name: Otomo, Katsuhiro
items.text:
Katsuhiro Otomo-inspired manga illustration.
Highly detailed cinematic linework.
Realistic mechanical and environmental detail.
Precise controlled inking style.
Subtle cel shading with realistic lighting.
Grounded anatomy with slight stylization.
Industrial sci-fi atmosphere.
Dynamic cinematic perspective and framing.
Complex but readable composition.
Akira-era manga realism aesthetic.
Strong focus on world detail and realism.
Not cartoonish.
Not simplified design.
items.author: BTP_Art

items.name: Miura, Kentaro
items.text:
Kentaro Miura-inspired dark fantasy manga illustration.
Extremely detailed ink linework.
Dense cross-hatching and texture rendering.
High realism anatomy with stylized exaggeration.
Dark atmospheric composition.
Heavy gothic fantasy aesthetic.
Highly intricate armor and environmental detail.
Cinematic framing and dramatic lighting.
Strong contrast between light and shadow.
Berserk manga visual style influence.
Emotional intensity and grounded realism.
Not simple or minimalist.
Not soft cel shading.
items.author: BTP_Art

items.name: Kishimoto, Masashi
items.text:
Masashi Kishimoto-inspired manga illustration.
Dynamic action-focused composition.
Sharp expressive facial acting.
Detailed but readable linework.
Strong emphasis on motion and impact.
Stylized ninja-inspired costume design.
Clear emotional expression in poses.
Controlled cel shading with moderate detail.
Balanced anatomy with slight stylization.
High-energy shonen manga aesthetic.
Naruto-era visual storytelling style.
Not photorealistic.
Not painterly.
items.author: BTP_Art

items.name: Otomo, katsuhiro
items.text:
Katsuhiro Otomo-inspired cinematic manga illustration.
Highly detailed mechanical linework.
Realistic anatomy with stylized proportions.
Precise ink rendering.
Controlled cel shading with subtle gradients.
Dense environmental detail.
Industrial sci-fi aesthetic.
Clean but complex composition.
Dynamic cinematic framing.
Akira-era manga realism style.
Not painterly.
Not soft animation.
items.author: Unknown

items.name: Toriyama, Akira
items.text:
Akira Toriyama-inspired clean animation illustration.
Highly readable character design.
Smooth inked linework.
Soft cel shading.
Simple but expressive facial features.
Clear anatomical structure.
Bright, clean color palette.
Balanced cartoon realism.
Strong silhouette readability.
Lightweight animation aesthetic.
Dragon Ball era illustration style.
No heavy texture or painterly shading.
